mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, stat_date, product_views, order_count, sales_amount, return_rate, aftersale_rate, fulfillment_rate, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_analytics_daily (supplier_id, stat_date, product_views, order_count, sales_amount, return_rate, aftersale_rate, fulfillment_rate, created_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{productViews, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{salesAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{returnRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{aftersaleRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{fulfillmentRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_analytics_daily (supplier_id, stat_date, product_views, order_count, sales_amount, return_rate, aftersale_rate, fulfillment_rate, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.statDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.productViews, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.orderCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.salesAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.returnRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.aftersaleRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.fulfillmentRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_analytics_daily WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM supplier_analytics_daily WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM supplier_analytics_daily WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_analytics_daily (supplier_id, stat_date, product_views, order_count, sales_amount, return_rate, aftersale_rate, fulfillment_rate, created_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statDate, jdbcType=DATE}, 0, #{orderCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{salesAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 0, 0, 0, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE order_count = order_count + VALUES(order_count), sales_amount = sales_amount + VALUES(sales_amount)
